notes: Scrape frontend and worker metrics separately. Frontend exposes queue and migration counters; worker exposes KV stats.
Use this lane as the production aggregated control before enabling split prefill/decode.

warnings: ITL is approximated from streamed output chunks rather than token-level traces.

reference_lane.summary: Production-validated InferScope lane. Results can be used for operator-facing comparisons within the current Kimi/Dynamo product scope.
